title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
summary_full: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.
summary_public: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.
